\documentclass[
  fromalign=right,
  fromrule=afteraddress,
  paper=a4,
  fontsize=11pt,
  parskip=half,
  version=last
]{scrlttr2}

\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[ngerman]{babel}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage{microtype}

%%LOGO_PACKAGE%%

\setkomavar{fromname}{%%FROM_NAME%%}
\setkomavar{fromaddress}{%%FROM_STREET%%\\%%FROM_ZIP%% %%FROM_CITY%%}
\setkomavar{fromphone}{%%FROM_PHONE%%}
\setkomavar{fromemail}{%%FROM_EMAIL%%}
%%LOGO_COMMAND%%

\begin{document}

\begin{letter}{%%TO_NAME%%\\%%TO_STREET%%\\%%TO_ZIP%% %%TO_CITY%%}

\opening{%%OPENING%%}

%%BODY%%

\closing{%%CLOSING%%}

\end{letter}
\end{document}
